_instructions: This file defines config-driven TimeGPT experiments for the lab.
Each experiment runs TimeGPT forecasts on timegpt_smoke_sample.csv and computes metrics.
To disable an experiment without deleting it:
- Each enabled experiment makes ONE TimeGPT API call
- Disable experiments you don't need to reduce costs

experiments.name: timegpt_baseline_14d
experiments.description: Baseline 14-day forecast matching Phase 04 smoke test behavior. Uses the last 14 points as holdout for evaluation.

experiments.name: timegpt_baseline_28d
experiments.description: Longer 28-day forecast to test TimeGPT performance on extended horizons. Uses the last 28 points as holdout.

experiments.name: timegpt_short_7d
experiments.description: Short 7-day forecast for quick validation. DISABLED by default - enable for rapid experimentation.
